renovations_upgrades: Kitchen renovated in 2019 (quartz counters, shaker cabinets, stainless appliances)
New furnace and central AC in 2021
Fresh interior paint and refinished hardwood floors in 2024
special_features: Proximity to Danforth shops and cafes
micro_location_notes: Quiet street south of Danforth Ave, short walk to TTC, limited through traffic. No garage; front-pad parking with city permit.
known_drawbacks: Narrow 18 ft frontage limits interior width
Basement ceiling height under 7 ft and not a legal suite
target_seller_goal: Maximize sale price while aiming for 1–2 strong offers within 2 weeks
